title: [Dedup][FIRRTL] SRAM modules not deduped when using memory macro replacement

features.name: identical module instances with memory primitive instantiation
features.description: Code should include two or more module instances that both instantiate the same memory primitive module with identical port connections

features.name: synchronous read-write memory interface ports
features.description: Code should include a module with synchronous read-write memory ports using the RW0_* naming convention (RW0_addr, RW0_clk, RW0_wmode, RW0_wdata, RW0_rdata)
features.snippet:
input [3:0] RW0_addr,
input RW0_clk,
input RW0_wmode,
input [7:0] RW0_wdata,
output [7:0] RW0_rdata

features.name: memory macro replacement with external memory module
features.description: Code should include a wrapper module around an external memory primitive (mem_ext) created by memory macro replacement, where multiple wrappers should be deduplicated
